sys_ui_action.comments: UI Action that transitions an In Progress case to Pending status. Visible to x_casemgmt_case_manager (always) and x_casemgmt_case_agent (only when assigned to the case via assigned_agent or member of assigned_group, per AAP Section 0.5.6 Assigned-only rule). Prompts the user for pending_reason (Awaiting Info / Awaiting Third Party / Other) on the client via a hybrid client+server pattern, then performs the transition on the server with defense-in-depth re-validation of role, status, assignment, and pending_reason. Per AAP Section 0.5.5 row 3 verbatim: "In Progress -> Pending: None; sets pending_reason (Awaiting Info / Awaiting Third Party / Other)". Companion to ../business_rules/x_casemgmt_clear_pending_reason_on_inprogress.xml which clears pending_reason on the reverse transition, and ../flows/sub_flows/validate_pending_transition.xml which handles the same transition at the Flow Designer workflow layer. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint, zero hardcoded sys_id literals, and zero PII.
sys_ui_action.hint: Pause this case (provide a pending reason).
sys_ui_action.name: Set Pending
